summary: I reviewed the Plan-phase artifacts (`design.md` and `workflow_plan.json`) against `guides/backend-guide.md` and `guides/ui-style-guide.md`, cross-checking the design's claims against the actual `_sidebar.html.erb`, `_theme_toggle.html.erb`, and `test/system/theme_toggle_test.rb`. The design holds up on every guide dimension in scope: the backend guide is legitimately not applicable (a pure view relocation with no business logic), and the UI guide is satisfied — semantic color tokens only, the `_theme_toggle` partial preserved as the single source of truth, icon-only-button aria-label/title retained, on-scale `gap-2` for the new row, and a Minitest system test extended with DOM-position-agnostic selectors for the critical flow plus keyboard-reachability. The only off-scale spacing values (`mt-1`, `p-3`) are pre-existing footer values carried over unchanged, not new deviations, so I recorded a **pass** verdict with no findings in `verdict.json`.
